content:
# Rayu Choeng Portfolio

A modern, interactive 3D portfolio website built with React, Three.js, and React Three Fiber.

## Features

- **Interactive 3D Objects**: Click and hover on cubes, spheres, and torus shapes
- **Particle System**: Dynamic floating particles with color variations
- **Advanced Lighting**: Multiple light sources with shadows
- **Smooth Animations**: Spring-based animations using React Spring
- **Performance Monitoring**: Real-time FPS and memory usage tracking
- **Responsive Design**: Optimized for desktop, tablet, and mobile devices
- **Modern UI**: Glass-morphism design with smooth transitions
- **ChatBot**: Interactive chatbot with QR code generation

## Technologies Used

- **React 19** - Modern React with hooks
- **Vite** - Fast build tool and development server
- **Three.js** - 3D graphics library
- **React Three Fiber** - React renderer for Three.js
- **React Three Drei** - Useful helpers for React Three Fiber
- **React Spring** - Spring-physics based animations
- **Framer Motion** - Animation library
- **EmailJS** - Email sending functionality

## Installation

```bash
# Clone the repository
git clone <repository-url>
cd version_reactjs

# Install dependencies
npm install

# Start development server
npm run dev

# Open browser to http://localhost:5173
```

## Controls

- **Mouse**: Rotate the camera around the scene
- **Scroll**: Zoom in and out
- **Right-click + Drag**: Pan the camera
- **Click Objects**: Interact with 3D objects

## Project Structure

```
src/
├── components/
│   ├── 3d/          # 3D objects (Cube, Sphere, Torus, Particles)
│   ├── ui/          # UI components (Navigation, InfoPanel)
│   └── pages/       # Page components (Header, About, Skills, Projects, Contact, Footer)
├── mobile/          # Mobile-specific components
├── repo/            # Data files (projects, skills, navigation, etc.)
├── hooks/           # Custom React hooks
├── styles/          # CSS files
└── App.jsx          # Main application
```

Built with React & Three.js
